assertions.description: EVP starts from an email input that advertises autocomplete=email.
The relying-party page can bind a session nonce to the email input.
The browser exposes a detectable native EVP event surface for receiving an email verification presentation token.
assertions.test: (()=>{const input=document.createElement('input');return 'onemailverified' in input||'EmailVerifiedEvent' in window||'EmailVerificationEvent' in window;})()

assertions.description: The page can determine whether the current context is secure before attempting native EVP.
The local demo backend returns a compact signed token for an email, audience, and nonce.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const nonce='nonce-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);const response=await fetch('/v150/email-verification-protocol/server-validator/api/sample',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email:'conformance@example-provider.com',expectedAud:'https://myapp.example.com',expectedNonce:nonce}),cache:'no-store'});if(!response.ok)return false;const data=await response.json();return typeof data.token==='string'&&data.token.split('.').length===3;})()

assertions.description: The local demo token includes the email address that was requested.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const email='payload-check@example-provider.com';const nonce='nonce-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);const response=await fetch('/v150/email-verification-protocol/server-validator/api/sample',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,expectedAud:'https://myapp.example.com',expectedNonce:nonce}),cache:'no-store'});if(!response.ok)return false;const {token}=await response.json();const payload=JSON.parse(atob(token.split('.')[1].replace(/-/g,'+').replace(/_/g,'/')+'==='.slice((token.split('.')[1].length+3)%4)));return payload.email===email&&payload.email_verified===true&&payload.nonce===nonce;})()

assertions.description: The local backend accepts a fresh signed token when audience and nonce match.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const nonce='nonce-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);const sample=await fetch('/v150/email-verification-protocol/server-validator/api/sample',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email:'fresh@example-provider.com',expectedAud:'https://myapp.example.com',expectedNonce:nonce}),cache:'no-store'});if(!sample.ok)return false;const {token}=await sample.json();const validated=await fetch('/v150/email-verification-protocol/server-validator/api/validate',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({token,expectedAud:'https://myapp.example.com',expectedNonce:nonce}),cache:'no-store'});if(!validated.ok)return false;const result=await validated.json();return result.valid===true&&result.payload.email==='fresh@example-provider.com';})()

assertions.description: The local backend rejects the same nonce when a token is validated twice.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const nonce='nonce-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);const sample=await fetch('/v150/email-verification-protocol/server-validator/api/sample',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email:'replay@example-provider.com',expectedAud:'https://myapp.example.com',expectedNonce:nonce}),cache:'no-store'});if(!sample.ok)return false;const {token}=await sample.json();const body=JSON.stringify({token,expectedAud:'https://myapp.example.com',expectedNonce:nonce});const first=await fetch('/v150/email-verification-protocol/server-validator/api/validate',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body,cache:'no-store'});const second=await fetch('/v150/email-verification-protocol/server-validator/api/validate',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body,cache:'no-store'});if(!first.ok||!second.ok)return false;const a=await first.json();const b=await second.json();return a.valid===true&&b.valid===false&&(b.checks||[]).some(check=>check.title.includes('replay')&&check.pass===false);})()
